CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT VON MULLER II, HAROLD LAWRENCE DEFT. TO PAY $1195.20 NO LATER THAN 5 DAYS FROM THIS ORDER. IF DEFT. DOES NOT PAY, PLAINTIFF SHALL BE THE PREVAILING PARTY AND SHALL BE ENTITLED TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESS. & FRO RENT DUE LESS 70% AND COSTS.
